content.en:
Heavenly Rank Holy Son Level!

Although Ye Tian didn't know much about the True Saintless Land, he could see from the Silver Moon Lord's reaction that this must be a very high status and status level.

At this time, the Frostless Lord said again: "Endless Lord, you can choose the position that the members of the Heavenly Rank Holy Son can choose, don't be in a hurry to choose first, and then choose slowly when you understand the situation of the True No Holy Land." You and the Silver Moon Lord will choose a place to live first. "

"Yes!"

Ye Tian and the Silver Moon Lord responded.

Subsequently, Ye Tian found a mountain range somewhere on Zhenwu Island, and then built it into his own residence, and in the future, he will retreat and cultivate here~

There are many treasures on the True Saintless Land, such as the Treasure Land for Raising Will, there are many here, and you only need to pay a very low price to cultivate there, and Ye Tian, as a member of the Heavenly Rank Saint Child, can use those treasures for free.

In the next period of time, Ye Tian focused on understanding the position of the True No Holy Land and the True No Holy Land.

Almost all the cultivators in the True Absence Holy Land are above the Eternal Realm, and at this point, the path has almost been set, so it is impossible to go to the Divine Realm to apprentice or anything, so the True Absence Holy Land is not mainly for disciples, but is divided into positions.

For example, the eternal realm of guarding the True No Islands is called the Island Patrol Envoy, and the status of the Island Patrol Envoy is very low, but the Island Patrol Commander in charge of the Island Patrol Envoy has a high status.

Ye Tian, as a key cultivation genius of the Heavenly Rank Saint Child, had a lot of positions to choose from, of course, he couldn't choose a low position, so he wanted to choose the highest number of positions he could choose.

At present, there are three highest positions that Ye Tian can choose.

Punishment Commander, Guardian Commander, and Truly No Island Lord!

The Punishment Commander is a very dangerous position to punish and hunt down members of the True Shrine who commit crimes, and it is easy to offend others.

After all, some disciples of the True Saintless Land have committed crimes, and if you are arrested, you will offend the high-level of the True Saintless Land behind him, and you may offend a Legendary Realm Lord one day.

Therefore, the position of penal commander may seem very high, but in fact it is a big hole.

The owner of the island is an idle position, that is, there are many countless islands on the islands, and if you choose an island to be the owner and take charge of an island, you can also get a certain income commission, and there is no danger.

However, the position of the owner of an ordinary Infinite Island is not valuable, and you can't get much benefit.

As for the town guard commander, you need to guard one side, in the town guard, it is the supreme commander, and has the face of representing the true and unholy land, the general forces dare not offend the town guard commander, but once in the wartime, the town guard commander is almost the most unlucky position.

Ye Tian thought about it and decided to choose the position of town guard commander.

After all, the Punishment Commander is a big pit, and the True Void Island Lord is too idle, and it doesn't help him at the moment, but he chose the Town Guard Commander He can apply to be guarded in the Source Sea, and the True Nothing Holy Land is definitely willing to use the Source Sea as a place for development and development.

Once the application is passed, Ye Tian can not only become the commander of the town guard, but also completely control the source sea, and whatever good things in the source sea also belong to him.

"It's up to you to see if you don't agree with it!

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he submitted the application and waited for a reply from the True Absence Holy Land.

Time passed slowly, and this day was really unholy and restored to Ye Tian.

"It's passed!"

When Ye Tian saw this message, he was immediately very happy.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went to receive the seal of the town guard, this seal is not an ordinary seal, although it is not an eternal treasure, but it is an eternal treasure second only to the eternal treasure.

In addition to this town guard seal, Ye Tian also obtained some resources and equipment.

Moreover, he also has the right to recruit his legions.

After all, as a town guard commander, it would be too humiliating to have only one person.

Therefore, he can recruit some Eternal Realm as his legions to guard the Source Sea.

Of course, he can also solicit in small amounts.

"There are only a few Legendary Realm Lords in the Source Sea, and the number of Eternal Realms is not very large, so I can only recruit some Eternal Realms in the Infinite Sea, at least the Immortal Realm Legendary Lords, and the lowest is the Nine-Step Immortal Realm Legendary Lords, and then recruit a group of Legendary Lords, and then return to the Source Sea through the time and space ladder. "

Ye Tian planned.

Then, in his capacity as the Guardian of the True Void Holy Land, he issued a solicitation message to the True-Void Islands, and although the Eternal Realm that joined the Guardian Leader of the Guardian Leader was not a direct member of the Guardian Leader, it was also a peripheral member.

In the case of not being able to join the True Sacred Land, it is also a good choice to choose to join the Town Guardian Legion.

Therefore, for the first time, many Eternal Realms came to sign up, but Ye Tian didn't want to cultivate to the Eternal Realm that did not reach the Nine-Step Immortal Realm Lord.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian had recruited many powerhouses above the Nine-Step Immortal Realm Lords, and there were even hundreds of Legendary Lords who were willing to join Ye Tian's Guardian Legion, and there were also nine Initial Realm Lords who had taken refuge in Ye Tian.

Ye Tian was selected and finally confirmed the quota.

He recruited a total of 3,000 Eternal Realms, and appointed those nine Initial Realm Leaders as the Nine Great Town Guardians.

.. コ0

The town guard legion was not allowed to enter the True Void Holy Land, so these 3,000 Eternal Realms gathered on an island in the True Void Islands, waiting for Ye Tian to descend.

When Ye Tian appeared, the 3,000 Eternal Realm members said respectfully, "Meet the Commander!"

Ye Tian nodded with satisfaction, and then said: "From today on, you are the town guard army under my command, this time we are going to the town guard not in the Infinite Sea, but in the new Eternal Sea, and we will go to that Eternal Sea through the time and space ladder later." I need each of you to take an oath not to divulge the location of the Eternal Sea. After all, the location of the Eternal Sea hadn't been revealed yet, so try not to let the outside world know. "

"Yes!"

These eternal realms nodded one by one, and immediately began to make vows, although the binding nature of the oath is not very large, and there is not even a big need to pay too much price, but with the oath, at least it can be restrained, and this time the oath takes the origin of the will as the object of the oath, once it is really violated, the origin of the will will be severely damaged, even if it is protected by secret arts, many eternal realms do not dare to violate it.

After the 3,000 Eternal Realm made an oath, Ye Tian took them to the Time and Space Staircase Hall of the True Void Holy Land in the True Void Islands.

Here, Ye Tian established a space-time staircase that connects to the Source Sea, and this space-time staircase will be protected by the space-time staircase hall, but a certain fee needs to be paid, and the space-time staircase hall will not allow others to pass through this space-time staircase.

Soon, the construction of the space-time ladder was completed, and Ye Tian stepped into the space-time ladder nine with 3000 Eternal Realms. _，
